definitions: Unable to identify or pinpoint something specific, despite knowing it exists or is present.
Having a vague sense or feeling about something but being unable to articulate it precisely.
examples: There's something different about this room, but I can't put my finger on it.
I know that tune, but I can't put my finger on it.
He seems upset, but I can't put my finger on it.
synonyms: It's on the tip of my tongue
source: I can't put my finger on it
